title: habitable evidence packet — manifest.json (v1)
description: The machine-readable contract for the sibling manifest.json alongside bundle.json in a habitable evidence packet (EXP-02). Deliberately NOT signed and NOT part of what habitable verify checks — it exists only so a human (or `habitable diff`) can see when a copy was produced without that wall-clock value perturbing the deterministic, signed bundle.json. See docs/bundle-schema.md.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC, e.g. 2026-01-02T00:00:00Z. When this specific copy was produced. Not evidentiary; not signed.
